text: Plague of Amwas (epidemic, 0638-01-01). epidemic in 7th century Syria
1793 Philadelphia yellow fever epidemic (epidemic, 1793-08-01). epidemic in the United States
Groningen epidemic (epidemic, 1826-01-01). 1826 malaria epidemic
1837–1838 smallpox epidemic (epidemic, 1837-01-01). disease outbreak in the United States
yellow fever in Buenos Aires (epidemic, 1852-01-01). series of yellow fever epidemics in 1852, 1858, 1870, and 1871
1854 Broad Street cholera outbreak (epidemic, 1854-01-01). Severe outbreak of cholera that occurred in London in 1854
1870 Barcelona yellow fever epidemic (epidemic, 1870-01-01). disease outbreak in Barcelona, Spain
2010–2012 Haiti cholera outbreak (epidemic, 2010-10-01). cholera outbreak spread by UN peacekeepers in Haiti
Gorakhpur hospital deaths (epidemic, 2017-08-07). tragic events in India
2019-2020 dengue fever epidemic in Venezuela (epidemic, 2019-01-01). viral outbreak in Venezuela
Loch Maree Hotel botulism poisoning (outbreak, 1922-08-15). first recorded outbreak of botulism in the United Kingdom, which occurred in 1922
2001 United Kingdom foot-and-mouth outbreak (outbreak, 2001-01-01). Epidemic in 2001 in the UK
2002 Barrow-in-Furness legionellosis outbreak (outbreak, 2002-01-01). disease outbreak in England
2018 Democratic Republic of the Congo Ebola virus outbreak (outbreak, 2018-01-01). disease outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo
Great Famine of 1315–1317 (famine, 1315-01-01). famine in 14th century medieval Europe
Great Bengal famine of 1770 (famine, 1767-01-01). famine affecting lower regions of India in 1770
Great Irish Famine (famine, 1845-01-01). 1845 -1852 famine in Ireland
1879 Irish Famine (famine, 1879-01-01). 1879 famine in Ireland
Holodomor (famine, 1932-01-01). man-made famine in Soviet Ukraine in 1932–33 that killed as many as seven million Ukrainians
Bengal famine of 1943 (famine, 1943-01-01). Famine in British India during World War II
Nyasaland Famine 1949 (famine, 1949-01-01). Famine in protectorate of Nyasaland
